card_description: Meister Eckhart (German: "Master Eckhart") is a historical figure appearing in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. In the philosophical tradition, Meister Eckhart is 14th century Christian mystic; Godhead beyond God. PKD deeply influenced by Eckhart's apophatic mysticism and the ground of the soul. Appears in 3 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Meister Eckhart. Context: "Dick explores the "Seeds of the Future" (Logos fragments) that are currently hidden in the present."
